When money from one economy is no longer being accepted by the economy supplying the seed, it will begin to run out. The Feds will then cut off all Fed funds for the sesame seed producers and the resulting fall in the price of the sesame seed will cause a recession.

It is a famous axiom in logic, stating that the most probable interpretation of a sentence is the one most commonly accepted by the general audience. Occam's Razor applies to logic in particular where there is a conflict between competing cognitive biases.
